title: Build a calendar app in AI Studio in 6 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial demonstrating how to build a no-code calendar app using Google AI Studio and Gemini. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations using advanced reasoning capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a calendar app in Google AI Studio using vibe coding. The app extracts travel itineraries and converts them into calendar invitations, with Gemini's reasoning used for troubleshooting errors and customizing the build. It demonstrates how code generation and natural language prompting combine to produce a working app in a short session.
